feedback.text: Payment Processors such as Visa, Mastercard, or PayPal are currently running a Monopoly, and bring companys like Valve to thier knees, as they demand deletion as censorship of digital goods. With thier power, they can demand about anything and no company can fight against it, because that would mean to lose payment methods, and as there are no other payment methods, they thus cant earn money. This allows the Payment Processors to Censor any amount of content, contradicting the freedom of speech and artistic freedoms, as well as competition, as they can decide who may succeed. Please, we need to stop thier madness, and save the Internet.
